query:
SELECT
               COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens), 0.0) as "input: f64",
               COALESCE(SUM(output_tokens), 0.0) as "output: f64",
               COALESCE(SUM(cache_creation_tokens), 0.0) as "cache_create: f64",
               COALESCE(SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0.0) as "cache_read: f64"
               FROM token_events
